title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Brigade Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Brigade Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
